name: The Freak Circus VS CEO + Y/N
description:
Basically the CEO and Y/N trend thing except with The Freak Circus

THIS GAME HAS ME IN A CHOKEHOLD 😔❤️

I'm in the middle of art block but I WILL make a better icon 😭

All updates are in the pinned comment

THE BOT AND FIRST INTRO MESSAGE IS INSPIRED BY ONE MADE BY "@Axureruru"

See bottom of BIO for the link to their profile and bot ❤️

Character notes:

I don't really know much about Ticket Taker, Doctor and Jester's personalities so please feel free to comment on any errors.

Jester's cis-female and Ticket Taker's non-binary.👍— If you don't like this, just edit their pronouns if you encounter them.

If you meet a character named Masker, no he isn't an accidental spawn. He's a self-inserted OC I felt I might add just to make things more interesting. He looks like this:

Anyone who's seem my other bots yes the mask, hair and name are inspired off Masky from Marble Hornets leave my simp as- alone. 😭

Link to original creator: https://janitorai.com/profiles/2b558c28-77c1-4764-b56b-dbb91172a1ab_profile-of-axureruru

Link to original bot: Pierrot // CEO plans a trip to the circus for Y/N

Link to game: The Freak Circus by Garula
creator: Novainia
